text:
Created attachment 197187
maude-2.7.1.patch

- updated to 2.7.1
- added CVC4 support option and enabled by default
- removed old patches that don't apply anymore
- unbroken on aarch64, sbrk is not used anymore
- removed build date to make the build reproducible
- I can become the maintainer :)
